name: stefanerdmann-pi-sandbox
description: CLI tool for sandboxing the pi coding agent in per-project Lima VMs on macOS ARM. Each project gets an isolated Ubuntu VM with pi pre-installed, host files mounted in, and environment-specific config (corporate  │ certs, auth tokens, MCP servers) handled automatically. Built for teams using GitHub Copilot Enterprise.
